text.title: PHP Eloquent ORM Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure for making an Eloquent model safe + performant.

step.name: set-fillable-and-casts
step.action: Declare `$fillable` (whitelist) listing only safe-to-mass-assign attributes. Declare `$casts` for booleans, JSON, dates, enums.

step.name: extract-scopes
step.action: For each WHERE used ≥2x, add scope method on the model: `public function scopeActive($query) { return $query->whereNull('deleted_at')->where('status', 'active'); }`.

step.name: audit-n-plus-one
step.action: For each detected N+1, add `->with('relation')` at the query origin OR `->load('relation')` after the collection is obtained.

step.name: wrap-multi-write-tx
step.action: Identify any service method with ≥2 writes. Wrap body in `DB::transaction(function () use (...) { ... })`.
step.decision-gate: If any multi-write path remains untrahsactional, STOP and wrap.

step.name: test-and-document
step.action: Write feature tests: mass-assignment with extra key (assert ignored); N+1 detection via assertQueryCount; transaction rollback test (throw mid-tx, assert DB unchanged).
